title: Structures, Unions, Tagged Variants, and Flexible Arrays · Mastery Check
summary: A safety board presents unfamiliar structures, unions, tagged variants, and flexible arrays decisions across code, diagrams, diagnostics, and stakeholder evidence; each distractor corresponds to a named misconception. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for tagged packet representation. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Initialize, copy, compare, and validate structures by members and invariants rather than raw-byte assumptions.
Pair a union with an explicit discriminant and access only the active, validated member.
Allocate flexible-array objects with checked header-plus-elements arithmetic and record their element count.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
